race.comment: LET'S DO IT AGAIN (1) resumed over 1400m at Gold Coast, beaten 2.25 lengths after being in contention on the bend. He has more up his sleeve and the step up to the mile suits. Placed here at his only second-up outing and finds easier with a 2kg claim. BUSKER (10) peaks and was back to his best when narrowly beaten over 1350m at Ipswich. He's raced well over this distance and is expected to feature. MORE FOR READY (4) went well 2x at Doomben and then jumped $2.2F at Warwick over 1350m and found one better after a slow off. Tackles the mile for the first time and gives every indication it will suit. Has genuine claims. Ditto BIT OF GRUNT (5) who did a good job off a wide gate at Doomben. Will be better for that but will have to do it the hard way again.
